decisions.decision: Do not commit .planning/config.json or Open Design artifacts unless explicitly requested.

decisions.decision: Persist UI review despite auditor write restriction.

next_action: Ask the user for the next action; recommended next step is gather the two missing evidence packets and rerun Open Design review, or proceed to /gsd-complete-milestone only if the evidence-only risk is accepted.
context_notes: Phase 3 and the v1.0 UI refactor milestone are implemented, verified, marked complete, UI-reviewed, browser_harness tested, and the `Tiền sân NaN ₫` finding is fixed. Full browser_harness screenshot sweep captured 14 screenshots grouped under /home/phatngo/.copilot/session-state/07dceea9-e423-4717-900e-03af338018ed/files/browser-harness-20260527-full-screens. The only actionable sweep finding was session detail `Tiền sân NaN ₫`; fixed in bad7cc0 and retested with browser_harness on mobile/desktop. Phase 3 UI review priority findings were fixed in 38778c0 and a direct style regression was fixed in 16608b0. Fresh UI re-audit score is 19/24 with remaining findings: typography token drift, SessionDetailView error feedback, and compact/icon-only accessibility/tap-target gaps. Mobile debt/QR feedback is fixed in 7a1ad79: full member names on mobile debt cards, compact QR labels/layout for iPhone SE, and group QR polling checks snapshot_ids with empty/incomplete results staying pending. Settings/TPBank feedback is fixed in 5e890b3. DB-backed bank settings are fixed in 841cfac: admin Settings manages `public.bank_config`, QR modal reads the active DB config, fallback/seed uses TPB `10003392871` / `CLB CAU LONG BMT`, and Supabase migration `restore_bank_config_settings` made `bank_config` public-read/admin-write. Browser_harness evidence is under /home/phatngo/.copilot/session-state/07dceea9-e423-4717-900e-03af338018ed/files/browser-harness-20260527-bank-config-settings. On 2026-06-01, browser_harness MCP connection was checked: doctor initially failed daemon/active connections, browser_harness run succeeded after reload, and final doctor passed daemon + active browser connection. Initial app smoke showed Supabase REST failures from Chrome cert validation (`ERR_CERT_AUTHORITY_INVALID`); enabling CDP `Security.setIgnoreCertificateErrors` fixed requests and the rerun passed 15/15 non-mutating smoke cases. Test cases, manifest, and categorized screenshots are under /home/phatngo/.copilot/session-state/2d00395f-5b2a-4898-a036-90f73efbadd6/files/browser-harness-20260601-smoke. Quick task 260601-nav completed in commit 1c4f7a4: MemberDetailView mobile cards and desktop rows now navigate to `/session/:session_id`; QR buttons use stopped propagation and still open the QR modal. Browser_harness evidence is under /home/phatngo/.copilot/session-state/2d00395f-5b2a-4898-a036-90f73efbadd6/files/member-detail-session-nav-20260601. Phase 3 security gate completed on 2026-06-01: 03-SECURITY.md is status verified with threats_open=0 and 12/12 plan-time threats closed using route/admin gate, Supabase contract, member CRUD guard, payment modal, type-check, and build evidence. Git remote origin is SSH git@github.com:nmphat/bmt-mgmt.git. Open Design daemon is http://127.0.0.1:17456 and web is http://127.0.0.1:17573. The MCP wrapper in this session still targets http://127.0.0.1:7456, but the import-ready UI review packet was imported directly via daemon API into project bmt-ui-review-20260601-0753 with 21 files. Web URL: http://127.0.0.1:17573/projects/bmt-ui-review-20260601-0753. Daemon preview: http://127.0.0.1:17456/api/projects/bmt-ui-review-20260601-0753/preview/35c911bd-19f8-421c-95ff-8e94b6a76b6a/index.html. Direct preview was browser_harness verified: it renders the Badminton Management UI Review Pack and 15/15 gallery; screenshot: /home/phatngo/.copilot/session-state/2d00395f-5b2a-4898-a036-90f73efbadd6/files/open-design-ui-review-20260601/verification/open-design-direct-preview-updated.png. Open Design review: Claude run 81012363-c29f-4168-acad-2bdf7ad8e2b4 failed with AGENT_AUTH_REQUIRED, Copilot run 95b5c036-9bdd-46c5-840d-fe614a3d0a17 succeeded. Outputs copied to /home/phatngo/.copilot/session-state/2d00395f-5b2a-4898-a036-90f73efbadd6/files/open-design-ui-review-20260601/OPEN-DESIGN-UI-REVIEW.md and review-findings.json. Verdict fix-before-archive, score 14/24, top issues: repeated mobile locked-state messaging, compact/tap-target accessibility, SessionDetailView error feedback, typography token drift, dense mobile card stacks, generic auth guard copy, and missing non-mutating admin/payment mutation evidence. Open Design fix-before-archive remediation completed on 2026-06-01: SessionDetailView now has inline retryable error feedback and compact locked chips instead of repeated full lock copy; MemberDetailView has 44px accessible compact actions and collapses mobile history after four sessions; login guard redirects preserve attempted route and show route-specific copy; typography tokens are normalized to 16px base. Verification: pnpm type-check, pnpm build, and targeted browser_harness 5/5 passed. Evidence and screenshots are under /home/phatngo/.copilot/session-state/2d00395f-5b2a-4898-a036-90f73efbadd6/files/open-design-ui-review-20260601/remediation-evidence and were uploaded to Open Design project bmt-ui-review-20260601-0753 under remediation-evidence/. Open Design remediation rerun completed on 2026-06-01: Copilot run 95acc6cc-0b43-496d-99df-1859669df6d2 succeeded and produced OPEN-DESIGN-UI-REVIEW-rerun.md plus review-findings-rerun.json. Verdict needs-more-evidence, score 16/24. Cleared: repeated locked-state messaging, reviewed member-detail QR tap targets, mobile member history density, and auth guard route context. Remaining archive gates are evidence-only: source/computed typography metrics proving 16px base and 14/16/20/32px scale, plus production-safe or mocked SessionDetailView fetch/action/payment failure evidence.

latest_update.summary: Open Design remediation rerun succeeded with Copilot but returned needs-more-evidence at 16/24. The visual remediation was mostly cleared; archive now requires two evidence packets: typography source/computed metrics and SessionDetailView failure-state evidence.
